name: Nothing Headphone（1） ReaLab Target Response 2024
note: Grey dotted target curve from the ReaLab page. Not a corrected headphone measurement and not baked into RepositoryFiles FIRs.

preciseq_qr_import.format: PNG QR containing preciseq-target:{JSON}; JSON fields verified from APK serializers: payload s,c; curve n,d,b; band f,g,q,t.
preciseq_qr_import.note: PrecisEQ target curves import via QR image, not repository URL. Dense ReaLab target is approximated with PEQ bands for QR import.
